threads_parent_created_active.name: threads_parent_created_active
threads_parent_created_active.where: "threads"."parent_thread_id" IS NOT NULL AND "threads"."deleted_at" IS NULL

threads_spawn_origin_required_fields.name: threads_spawn_origin_required_fields
threads_spawn_origin_required_fields.value: "threads"."origin_type" != 'spawn' OR ("threads"."kind" = 'subagent' AND "threads"."parent_thread_id" IS NOT NULL AND "threads"."origin_turn_id" IS NOT NULL AND "threads"."spawn_status" IS NOT NULL)

threads_fork_origin_required_fields.name: threads_fork_origin_required_fields
threads_fork_origin_required_fields.value: "threads"."origin_type" != 'fork' OR ("threads"."kind" = 'primary' AND "threads"."parent_thread_id" IS NOT NULL AND "threads"."origin_turn_id" IS NOT NULL)

threads_organic_origin_fields_empty.name: threads_organic_origin_fields_empty
threads_organic_origin_fields_empty.value: "threads"."origin_type" IS NOT NULL OR ("threads"."parent_thread_id" IS NULL AND "threads"."origin_turn_id" IS NULL AND "threads"."spawn_status" IS NULL)

context_sources_work_slug.name: context_sources_work_slug
context_sources_work_slug.where: "context_sources"."work_id" IS NOT NULL AND "context_sources"."deleted_at" IS NULL

context_sources_exactly_one_scope.name: context_sources_exactly_one_scope
context_sources_exactly_one_scope.value: ("context_sources"."project_id" IS NOT NULL AND "context_sources"."work_id" IS NULL) OR ("context_sources"."project_id" IS NULL AND "context_sources"."work_id" IS NOT NULL)

documents_context_root_name_active.name: documents_context_root_name_active
documents_context_root_name_active.where: "documents"."folder_id" IS NULL AND "documents"."deleted_at" IS NULL AND "documents"."kind" = 'manuscript'

document_branches_owner_shape.name: document_branches_owner_shape
document_branches_owner_shape.value: ("document_branches"."kind" = 'work_draft' AND "document_branches"."work_id" IS NOT NULL AND "document_branches"."thread_id" IS NULL) OR ("document_branches"."kind" = 'thread_peer' AND "document_branches"."thread_id" IS NOT NULL)
